name: kingstone-investments-fullstack
description: Kingstone Investments - Fullstack Application (Frontend + Backend + Database)

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.db:setup: cd backend && npx prisma generate && npx prisma db push && npm run seed
scripts.db:migrate: cd backend && npx prisma migrate dev --name init
scripts.db:push: cd backend && npx prisma db push
scripts.build: npm --prefix frontend install && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.dev:fullstack: npm run dev:backend & npm run dev:frontend
scripts.start: echo Use npm run dev:fullstack to start both servers
scripts.kill:ports: lsof -ti :5000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || true; lsof -ti :3000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.check:ports: echo === Port Status === && lsof -i :5000 2>/dev/null || echo Port 5000 (Backend): FREE && lsof -i :3000 2>/dev/null || echo Port 3000 (Frontend): FREE

author: Kingstone Investments
